title: Application Autopilot — Backend & Matching Engine
description: Background agent finds high-fit jobs (80%+), generates cover letter + resume tailoring tips, queues for user review. Uses existing job board listings + OpenRouter LLM scoring. OUT OF SCOPE: auto-apply, PDF resume edits, scraping beyond existing GitHub sync, Exa/Vectorize.

userStories.title: Autopilot preferences and pending_opportunities schema
userStories.description:
User fields:
- autopilot_enabled: bool = False
- autopilot_min_match_score: int = 80
- autopilot_max_daily: int = 5

New collection pending_opportunities:
```
{
  user_id: ObjectId,
  job_listing_id: ObjectId,
  match_score: int,
  match_reason: str,
  cover_letter: {subject, body},
  resume_tips: {summary, bullet_suggestions: []},
  status: 'pending' | 'approved' | 'dismissed',
  created_at: datetime,
  reviewed_at: datetime | null
}
```
Index: (user_id, status), (user_id, job_listing_id) unique for pending.

PATCH /api/auth/me for prefs. Settings UI toggle.

userStories.title: LLM job match scorer for listings
userStories.description: backend/autopilot/match_scorer.py score_listing_for_user() via OpenRouter. Optional httpx fetch apply_url for description_snippet cache on job_listings. Quota via ai_cache.

userStories.title: Nightly autopilot scan job
userStories.description: APScheduler autopilot_scan daily 05:00 UTC. Prefilter via get_recommended_listings, LLM score, cap at autopilot_max_daily, dedup against applications and pending_opportunities.
acceptanceCriteria: Respects user prefs and daily cap

userStories.title: Cover letter and resume tips generation
userStories.description: backend/autopilot/prep_generator.py generate_opportunity_prep() — cover letter JSON + suggest-only resume tips. Stored on pending_opportunities.

userStories.title: Pending opportunities API
userStories.description: /api/autopilot: GET /pending, GET /pending/{id}, POST approve (creates To Apply application), POST dismiss. Approve does NOT auto-apply.
